svg.title: QuoteVault CI/CD Architecture
svg.desc: Pipeline flow from developer push through GitHub Actions CI, Docker Hub, to AWS EC2 deployment

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What happens when a developer pushes code in a CI/CD pipeline?')
sendPrompt('What role does the GitHub repository play in a CI/CD pipeline?')
sendPrompt('What does npm ci do in a CI pipeline?')
sendPrompt('Why do we run tests before building the Docker image?')
sendPrompt('What happens during docker build and push in GitHub Actions?')
sendPrompt('What is Docker Hub used for in a CI/CD pipeline?')
sendPrompt('What is Docker Hub and why do we use it as a registry?')
sendPrompt('How does GitHub Actions SSH into an EC2 instance to deploy?')
sendPrompt('What runs on the EC2 instance in this project?')
sendPrompt('How do I verify my app is live on EC2?')
